The Crisis

AI Agents Are Unverifiable.
And Dangerously Exposed.

I spent 7 years in fraud detection and saw this firsthand. Every AI agent I encountered was a black box — no identity, no audit trail, no accountability.

$10.3B
Annual losses from AI fraud & agent exploits
// Gartner 2025
89%
Enterprises lack visibility into AI agent behavior
// IBM Security 2025
Aug 2026
EU AI Act enforcement — mandatory, no extensions
// EU Official Journal
60%
AI deployments fail security & compliance audits
// Gartner Feb 2026

No Identity Standard

Any agent can impersonate another. No cryptographic root of trust exists across AI frameworks, clouds, or vendors. The attack surface is unlimited.

No Runtime Defense

Agents write, deploy and execute code autonomously — exposing APIs, injecting backdoors, creating unsafe logic in real time with zero oversight.

No Compliance Path

EU AI Act penalties: €30M or 6% of global revenue. 80% of enterprises have zero certification roadmap. The deadline is law, not a suggestion.

⚠️ Hard Regulatory Deadline

EU AI Act Enforcement
Begins August 2026

The clock is not symbolic. Every enterprise deploying autonomous AI agents without certified identity, audit trails, and compliance documentation faces massive financial penalties.

The Platform Vision

One SDK. Complete Trust + Security.

The full stack we're building — deployed in layers with seed capital. Status shown honestly.

🔐
Identity Passports

Quantum-resistant cryptographic IDs (W3C DID + Dilithium) for every AI agent. Real-time issuance, verification, and revocation.

✅ LIVE NOW
🛡️
Autonomous Security MCP

LLM trained on 2M+ LoC detects vulnerabilities, backdoors & unsafe logic — real-time threat detection and instant alerts. Zero config.

🔶 Q2 2026 BETA
🧬
Behavioral Fingerprinting

ML-powered continuous auth via agent decision patterns. Self-improving data moat — 65% impersonation reduction in benchmarks.

🔶 Q3 2026
✅
ZK Compliance Engine

zk-SNARKs for EU AI Act, GDPR, HIPAA certification. Architecture complete — implementation begins post-seed.

⬜ POST-SEED
🔗
Federated Trust Network

Decentralized verification mesh. No central data store. GDPR-compliant. Spec complete — builds post-seed.

⬜ POST-SEED
🖥️
Confidential Execution

TEE support (Intel SGX / AMD SEV) with remote attestation. Runtime integrity proof. eIDAS 2.0 aligned.

⬜ POST-SEED
Now Live — Layer 2

SigilGuard™ Reliability Engine

Real-time detection and mitigation of the AI failure modes that break production agents. Three modules. One line to activate.

🌀
DriftGuard™

Detects temporal context drift in long-running agents. Scores coherence in real-time and triggers auto-summarisation before reasoning degrades.

✅ LIVE NOW
🛡️
Hallucination Shield™

Intercepts fabricated facts and reasoning errors before they reach execution. Fact-anchors every agent output against verified source context.

✅ LIVE NOW
⚡
EdgeGuard™

Sub-10ms reliability protection for robots and edge devices. Offline-first policy enforcement with periodic trust network sync.

🔶 Q2 2026 BETA

Now Live — Layer 3

Execution Trust Layer™

Pre-execution governance — every AI action is checked for intent, authority, and policy before it runs. Submit a request below and watch the gates fire in real time.

🔐
Intent & Authority

Every proposed action is verified against the agent's declared permission scope. No action runs without a valid chain traceable to a human principal.

✅ LIVE NOW
🚦
Decision Gates

Configurable policy checkpoints. High-risk actions route to human-in-the-loop. Low-risk paths execute automatically within programmed thresholds.

✅ LIVE NOW
📋
Immutable Audit Log

Cryptographically signed, tamper-evident trail for every action. Real-time streaming. One-click export for EU AI Act and GDPR regulators.

✅ LIVE NOW

How It Works

Trusted & Secure in Under 60 Seconds

Three steps from zero to a verified, security-hardened AI agent.

01

Issue a Passport

Agent registers via SDK → receives quantum-resistant cryptographic identity. Works with any framework. Real-time verification built in.

npm install @verisigil/sdk
verisigil.init('YOUR_KEY')
→ passport issued ✓
02

Continuous Defense

Behavioral fingerprinting monitors 24/7. MCP engine scans code in real time and detects threats instantly.

[THREAT] SQL injection line 42
[FIXING] Patching...
[DONE] Redeployed in 142ms ✓
03

Prove Compliance

Every action logged immutably on-chain. Zero-knowledge proofs certify EU AI Act, GDPR, and HIPAA — no sensitive data exposed.

EU_AI_ACT: CERTIFIED ✓
GDPR:     COMPLIANT ✓
HIPAA:    CERTIFIED ✓
MCP Integration

The Security Engine
Inside Your AI Tools

⚡

Zero Configuration

Install once. VeriSigil AI learns your codebase and starts protecting automatically. No rules to write.

🔍

Works Where You Build

Native integration with Cursor, Windsurf, Cline, Claude Desktop, and OpenAI Codex. One MCP server for your entire workflow.

🤖

Autonomous Remediation

Detects structural flaws, backdoors & bad APIs — auto-fixes, tests, and redeploys a secure version. No human in the loop.

📊

Full Audit Trail

Every scan, fix, and deployment logged immutably. One-click compliance reports for EU AI Act auditors and CISOs.

VeriSigil AI — MCP Security Engine
$ verisigil scan --agent trading-bot-v2
Scanning 1,247 lines of code...
 
[HIGH] eval() detected at line 89
[MED]  unsafe subprocess at line 203
[MED]  hardcoded secret at line 341
 
Auto-patching 3 vulnerabilities...
[FIXED] eval() → safe_eval()
[FIXED] Sandboxed subprocess
[FIXED] Secret moved to env vault
 
[DONE]  Redeployed in 142ms
[LOG]   Audit trail anchored on-chain
 
$

Identity Recognition

VeriSigil AI Gives Every Agent
Its Own Verifiable Face

Just like ChatGPT doesn't look like OpenAI's corporate brand — every AI agent deserves its own cryptographic identity. VeriSigil AI issues unique, tamper-proof identity passports that make each agent instantly recognisable, verifiable, and legally accountable.

VeriSigil AI assigns every agent a unique cryptographic passport — a tamper-proof identity that proves who the agent is, who built it, what it's certified to do, and that it hasn't been impersonated. Every face. Every agent. Verified.

🔐
Unique Identity
Cryptographic DID passport — no two agents share the same signature or face
🛡️
Anti-Impersonation
Any agent falsely claiming to be Claude or Gemini is instantly detected and rejected
📜
Verifiable Lineage
Immutable record of who built the agent, when, and exactly what it's certified to do
⚖️
EU AI Act Ready
Every passport includes compliance metadata — legally audit-ready from day one
